allow: PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" --version; & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth status)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" repo list advance --limit 100)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" repo list AdvanceUCT --limit 100 --json name,description,visibility,updatedAt --jq '.[] | "\\\(.visibility\)\\t\\\(.updatedAt[:10]\)\\t\\\(.name\)\\t\\\(.description // ""\)"')

PowerShell($repos = @\("unify-admin-portal","unify-agent-service","unify-student-wallet","unify-vendor-portal"\); foreach \($r in $repos\) { Write-Output "=== $r ==="; & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api "repos/AdvanceUCT/$r/branches" --jq '.[] | "\\\(.name\)\\t\\\(.commit.sha[:7]\)"'; Write-Output ""; & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api "repos/AdvanceUCT/$r" --jq '"default=\\\(.default_branch\) pushed=\\\(.pushed_at\)"'; Write-Output "" })

PowerShell($repos = @\("unify-admin-portal","unify-agent-service","unify-student-wallet","unify-vendor-portal"\); foreach \($r in $repos\) { Write-Output "=== $r ==="; & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api "repos/AdvanceUCT/$r/branches" --jq '.[].name' | ForEach-Object { $sha = & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api "repos/AdvanceUCT/$r/commits/$_" --jq '.commit.committer.date'; "$_`t$sha" } })
